recommendations.title: Diana: In Her Own Words
recommendations.overview: Using home videos recorded by her voice coach, Diana takes us through the story of her life.

recommendations.title: Cobain: Montage of Heck
recommendations.overview: Hailed as one of the most innovative and intimate documentaries of all time, experience Kurt Cobain like never before in the only ever fully authorized portrait of the famed music icon. Academy Award nominated filmmaker Brett Morgen expertly blends C

recommendations.title: The Figo Affair: The Transfer That Changed Football
recommendations.overview: This documentary spotlights one of the most contentious deals in football history and the extraordinary player at the center of the storm: Luís Figo.

recommendations.title: I Am Heath Ledger
recommendations.overview: The life and career of an actor, artist, and icon. His own journey through his own camera.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: The Speed Cubers
recommendations.overview: This documentary captures the extraordinary twists and turns in the journeys of Rubik's Cube-solving champions Max Park and Feliks Zemdegs.

recommendations.title: After Porn Ends 3
recommendations.overview: After Porn Ends 3 continues to explore whether a career as an adult performer is inherently damaging to the balance of a perfomer's life once retired.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Francesco Totti
recommendations.overview: Francesco Totti retraces his entire life while watching it on the silver screen together with the audience. Images and emotions flow among key moments of his career, scenes from his personal life and memories he has never shared before.

recommendations.title: Ronaldo
recommendations.overview: Filmed over 14 months with unprecedented access into the inner circle of the man and the sport, this is the first official and fully authorised film of one of the most celebrated figures in football.  For the first time ever, the world gets vividly c

recommendations.title: Bobby Fischer Against the World
recommendations.overview: The first documentary feature to explore the tragic and bizarre life of the late chess master Bobby Fischer.
